 Dang contacted Img2Img to claim their profile and to verify their information although Img2Img has not yet claimed their profile or reviewed their information for accuracy. 

## What is the main use case for img2img.net?

​

The main use case for Img2Img.net is to simplify the AI image-to-image (img2img) transformation process. It allows users to upload their own photos and instantly apply various artistic styles—such as Studio Ghibli, Cyberpunk, or Oil Painting—without needing to write complex prompts or understand technical AI parameters. It's perfect for creating unique social media avatars, artistic portraits, and creative visual content.

​

## Who is the target audience of img-2-img.net?

​

Our target audience includes social media creators, digital artists, hobbyists, and anyone who wants to explore the power of AI art but finds existing tools like Midjourney or Stable Diffusion too complex. It is also a valuable resource for designers looking for quick style inspiration or individuals wanting to personalize their digital presence with high-quality, AI-generated visuals.

​

## What model of AI does img2img.net use?

​

Img2Img.net leverages advanced Stable Diffusion models optimized for image-to-image tasks. We use a combination of fine-tuned checkpoints and ControlNet technology to ensure that the AI maintains the structural integrity of the original photo while accurately applying the chosen artistic style, resulting in high-fidelity and aesthetically pleasing transformations.

Transform Your Photos into Stunning AI Art, Effortlessly.

### Does Img2Img have a discount code or coupon code?

Yes, Img2Img offers a discount code and coupon code. You can save by using coupon code when creating your account. Create your account here and save: [Img2Img](https://l.dang.ai/img2img-img-2-img-net).
